_schema: County gossip banks — Director-authored (2026-07-03), verbatim. A bank with requires_flag only surfaces after that flag is set (this is the county remembering what you did). Flagged banks outrank general ones. Surfaced at the diner (Patti) and anywhere gossip_source nodes appear.

lines: Heard somebody got Hollis baler going again.
Some folks fix equipment. Some folks fix reputations.
Word travels quicker than trucks around here.
You can keep a secret in Ash Creek about as long as a milkshake lasts.
Word is somebody tried fixing Hollis baler and managed to make Thursday more expensive.
Diner's already heard it.
Didn't take long for that story to get legs.
Heard you've been wrenching on things.
Maybe let Hollis work on that one.
[BLANK G1 — county notes you deliver what you shake on. Awaiting Director.]
[BLANK G2 — a missed handshake travels fast. Awaiting Director.]
Saturday auction's got a couple tractors worth looking at.
Depends if you like projects.
Depends if you like surprises.
Bank loves good years. Bank remembers bad ones.
Interest don't sleep.
Payments don't care if it rained.
Nothing costs more than cheap equipment.
Except maybe brand new equipment.
People around here don't expect perfection. They just expect you to show up.
Help somebody once and they'll remember.
Help them twice and they'll call.
Everybody farms different. Weather humbles all of us the same.
Nobody's smarter than a drought.
Nobody outruns mud.
